a_image.alt: Particle Effects style mood board — Heavy Motion · Particles

sections.a_eyebrow: Heavy Motion · Generative · Advanced JS · Interactive · 3D
sections.a_description: Swarms of luminous dots, connecting lines that trace invisible networks, and dynamic particle systems that breathe life into dark backgrounds — Particle Effects design creates atmospheric, generative environments behind clean interface elements. The deep dark blue backgrounds serve as infinite canvases where particle constellations suggest neural networks, star fields, or molecular structures in constant, mesmerizing motion.

This generative style powers AI and machine learning company websites, blockchain platforms, network visualization tools, and tech startup landing pages. You'll see it on cybersecurity dashboards, data analytics platforms, cryptocurrency exchanges, and scientific computing sites — anywhere that particle systems create an atmospheric backdrop suggesting complexity, connectivity, and the invisible data flows that power modern technology.

a_image_cover.alt: Particle Effects style use case illustration
Particle Effects style use case illustration
Particle Effects style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The atmospheric, generative aesthetic of particle-effect websites — swarms of dots, connecting lines, and dynamic particle systems that create living, breathing backgrounds behind clean UI. Background: deep dark blue (#080c18) — an infinite sky for particle constellations. The .inner panel uses a dark translucent background (rgba(8,12,24,0.9)) with a subtle border (1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.15)) and 12px border-radius — content floating above the particle field. Colors: electric indigo (#6366f1) as the primary accent — matching the particle glow and connection lines. Soft white (#e8eaed) for headings, cool gray (#8b92a5) for body text. The aesthetic is cosmic and data-driven — particles suggest networks, neural connections, star fields, or molecular structures. Set in Outfit — a modern geometric sans-serif that's clean enough to read over busy particle backgrounds. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #e8eaed. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #6366f1. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height: 1.7, color #8b92a5. Buttons: primary — indigo (#6366f1), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, indigo border. Alternatives: Space Grotesk (technical geometric), DM Sans (clean modern).
